name: Free look period cancellation — within 15 days
description: User received policy and wants to cancel within free look period

input.message: I received a life insurance policy document 10 days ago but I don't want it anymore. Can I cancel it? Will I get a full refund?

notes: 15-day free look period (30 for online/distance policies). Refund = premium paid minus risk premium for days covered + stamp duty. This is a consumer right under IRDAI regulations.
